name: star-office-app
description: Star Office - Pixel Affiliate HQ Native App

scripts.cap:init: npx cap init "Star Office" com.haixinlobster.staroffice --web-dir frontend
scripts.cap:build:android: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
